name: Breach the server
description: Gain access before the trace completes.

name: Rig the dead hub
description: Lay trunk lines so buried ops can surface in the mission roster.

name: Extract the asset
description: Escort the contact out under pressure.

name: Vector Null infiltration
description: Slip the perimeter before the shift change; leave no badge trail.

name: Black Ledger sweep
description: Sanitize the node before the syndicate reconciles the float.

name: Cold Storage placement
description: Stage the payload where audits look benign and cameras look away.

name: Apex Contingency overwatch
description: Hold the corridor until the package clears the mezzanine choke.

name: Ninth Circle cutout burn
description: Retire a cutout identity while the cell still believes the cover holds.

name: Phantom Reach cartography
description: Map ingress vectors the consortium forgot to classify.

name: Iron Veil meet
description: A smile, a folder, and a lie that buys twelve minutes at the desk.

name: Sigma-7 exfil window
description: Beat the rotating cordon; the window is measured in elevator cycles.

name: Midnight Annex survey
description: Quiet measurements on a site the annex pretends is dormant.

name: Cascade Failure denial
description: Trip safeguards so the failure reads like incompetence, not intent.

name: Glass Dagger pickup
description: Retrieve the dead drop before the initiative rotates the blind.

name: Helix Ascendant sample lift
description: Lift the sample from the lab edge while compliance tours the clean room.

name: Kestrel Black relay
description: Stand up a relay the wetworks annex can trust for one broadcast only.

name: Third Rail distraction
description: Crowd physics as cover while the real move happens three blocks east.

name: Archive of Last Resorts breach
description: Crack the seal without tripping the quiet board's audit ping.

name: Viper's Hand corridor lock
description: Own the choke long enough for the syndicate to move the principal.

name: Hollow Crown social pass
description: Engineer a plausible reason to be exactly where the crown forbids.

name: Nocturne Logistics hardening
description: Harden the route against spot checks; logistics hates surprises.

name: Directive Null-Three intercept
description: Intercept the briefing packet before oversight routes the rewrite.

name: Obsidian Reach dead zone
description: Carve a comms dead zone so the reach hears static, not footsteps.

name: Redline Directive cut
description: Cut the directive chain at the node that still thinks it's redundant.

name: Omega Protocol mirror
description: Mirror legitimate traffic until the protocol group signs off on the forgery.

name: Shadow Directorate plant
description: Plant the narrative asset where the directorate's own analysts will find it.

name: Vanta Operations sanitize
description: Scrub prints and fibers before the cell's morning sweep hits the floor.

name: Cipher Key rotation
description: Rotate keys under the directorate's nose; they must believe it's maintenance.

name: Grey Commission witness
description: Become the witness the commission cannot dismiss without admitting the leak.

name: Burner Doctrine purge
description: Purge the doctrine cache while the collective still argues jurisdiction.

name: Threshold Crossing hold
description: Hold the crossing until the bureau's convoy commits past the point of return.

name: Rook & Bishop feint
description: A visible feint so strategic misses the piece sliding along the diagonal.

name: Project ECLIPSE blind
description: Blind oversight sensors for one orbit; oversight blames weather.

name: Subversion Protocol Seven lock
description: Lock the protocol floor while seven still thinks the alarm is a drill.

name: Quiet Board minutes lift
description: Lift minutes that never made the deck—only the board's quiet copy.

name: Argent Serpent handshake
description: Seal the handshake the collective will deny if pressed by daylight.

name: Deep Cover Cartography seed
description: Seed falsified charts so cartography sells the wrong story upstream.

name: Counterweight diversion
description: Tip the counterweight; let the initiative chase balance while you move.

name: Last Light strategic cut
description: Cut the strategic uplink before last light reroutes through the backup mesh.
